items.title: Yaxel Lendeborg is a risky pick by the Warriors. Bennett Stirtz, too. Since 2008, the history of players age 22 and older on NBA draft day is not great. Lendeborg is the second-oldest player drafted in the top 20 picks in the last 18 years.
items.author: Mike Vorkunov
items.body_excerpt: Yaxel Lendeborg is a risky pick by the Warriors. Bennett Stirtz, too. Since 2008, the history of players age 22 and older on NBA draft day is not great. Lendeborg is the second-oldest player drafted in the top 20 picks in the last 18 years.

media.title: Warriors work out three point guards with unique strengths ahead of upcoming 2026 NBA Draft
media.description: The Golden State Warriors scouted three point guards on Thursday: Arizona's Brayden Burries, Alabama's Labaron Philon Jr. and Iowa's Bennett Stirtz.
